---
title: "Norah Kuduk"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpeg
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/norah-kuduk
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/norah-kuduk
---
:::{#hero-heading}
I build data-driven tools and models that turn complex information into clearer insights, with a particular passion for sports and insights analytics. I hold a BSc in Computer Science and Statistics from St. Lawrence University and am completing an MSc in Data Science at the London School of Economics and Political Science (graduating September 2026).

My project work spans interactive Shiny applications for F1 telemetry, graph neural networks for urban bike-share demand forecasting, and distributed machine learning pipelines on GCP — giving me hands-on experience across the full data science stack, from wrangling messy real-world data to deploying scalable models.

I'm drawn to roles in customer insights and data science where I can work as part of a  team to uncover patterns in real-world data and translate them into decisions that matter.

Outside of technical work, I've sharpened my ability to communicate quantitative ideas clearly through academic mentoring and coaching, skills I can bring directly into cross-functional teams.

If anything here interests you, feel free to reach out!

## Education
**The London School of Economics and Political Science** | London, UK
MSc in Data Science | Sept 2025 – Sept 2026

**St. Lawrence University** | Canton, NY, USA
BSc in Computer Science and Statistics | Aug 2021 – May 2025

## Skills
**Languages:** Python, R, Java, SQL
**ML & Analytics:** PyTorch, Apache Spark MLlib, Scikit-learn, Machine Learning, Deep Learning
**Visualisation:** Shiny, Plotly, Seaborn, ggplot2, Tableau, PowerBI
**Tools & Infrastructure:** Docker, PostgreSQL, GCP, Flutter, Git
:::
